rulings.Case Title: KATIUSKA ABURTO et al VS. ANNA T WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing Of Defts Anna Wong, Larry Wong And Jack Wong'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To The (Unnumbered) 15th Cause Of Action Of Pltfs' First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 30, 2010, line 2, DEFENDANTS ANNA WONG, LARRY WONG, JACK WONG Notice of Hearing of Defendants Anna Wong, Larry Wong And Jack Wong's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings as To The (Unnumbered) 15th Cause of Action of Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint. Motion granted with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiffs must plead formation of conspiracy with adequate detail and specify each defendant's role as to each underlying wrong. Defendant Larry Wong cannot be held liable for civil conspiracy, no duty owed to plaintiffs. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: GILLES COMBRISSON VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, March 30, 2010, line 6, CROSS DEFENDANT ANTHEM BLUE CROSS LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled in part and sustained in part. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to second cause of action, breach of contract based upon agency. Plaintiff was seeking medical care for himself. No agency relationship established between plaintiff and cross-defendant. No reasonable probability that defect can be cured by amendment. Demurrer overruled as to all remaining causes of action. =(302/CWW)
